findings: Mobile header CTA and nav treatment overflowed the right edge.
Hero eyebrow and headline clipped on narrow screens instead of wrapping safely.
Hero CTA row, meta badges, and quick-action cards were too wide for mobile gutters.
Bottom sticky action rail labels were too crowded and partially clipped on mobile.
The page needed an explicit no-horizontal-scroll guard and a more intentional first-screen hero height.
fixes_applied: Compressed the mobile header to a compact brand-plus-menu CTA treatment.
Constrained hero typography and enabled safer wrapping for the eyebrow and headline.
Stacked hero CTAs and meta badges on small screens and tightened quick-action card spacing.
Reduced sticky action spacing and shortened the Directions label to Map for fit.
Locked root horizontal overflow and added mobile bottom padding for the sticky rail.
blocker: Mission Control QA writeback is blocked in this runtime because AGENCY_AUTONOMY_API_KEY and OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET are unavailable; payload recorded locally only.
